breaking.title: Funeral prayers in Iraq for Iranian supreme leader commence after body arrives in holy city
breaking.summary: Iran's new supreme leader, Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei, has yet to make an appearance in the funeral ceremonies, which are unfolding over several days. He is believed to be in hiding after reportedly being wounded in the airstrike that killed his father

breaking.title: 2 killed as Russia bombs Ukraine ahead of Zelenskyy-Trump Nato meet
breaking.summary: The latest assault came just a day after one of the deadliest Russian attacks on Kyiv in recent months claimed 30 lives. The renewed strikes underscored Moscow's continuing pressure on Ukraine even as Nato leaders prepared to discuss military support, regional security and the future course of the war. Ukraine's State Emergency Service later said two people were wounded in the capital.

breaking.title: New U.S. attacks on Iran were absolutely necessary, NATO chief says
breaking.summary: The ​U.S. military unleashed a ⁠new wave of strikes against Iran after three tankers were hit by projectiles in the ‌Strait of Hormuz, putting pressure on ‌an ⁠already fragile ceasefire

breaking.title: Trump says Iran ceasefire ‘over’ after fighting flares
breaking.summary: “I’ll let our wonderful negotiators keep talking if they want, but I don’t see it. I don’t like these people,” Mr. Trump said

breaking.title: Tehran targets Bahrain, Kuwait after U.S. strikes and limits Iran's oil sales over ship attacks
breaking.summary: Negotiations to reach a final deal on reopening the Strait of Hormuz had been due to start after Khamenei's burial. But the new attacks has thrown that into question

breaking.title: Indian UN Mission building evacuated as nearby NYC high-rise buckles, faces risk of collapse
breaking.summary: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani described the situation as "extremely serious"

breaking.title: Why did the U.S. indict Lawrence Bishnoi over Hardeep Singh Nijjar’s murder?
breaking.summary: The U.S. has indicted Lawrence Bishnoi, a jailed Indian gangster, for his alleged role in a transnational conspiracy linked to the murder of Khalistani separatist Hardeep Singh Nijjar in Canada in June 2023.

breaking.title: Stock Market LIVE Updates, Sensex Today: Sensex Sheds 1,600 Points As Trump Says US-Iran Deal "Is Over"
breaking.summary: Sensex Today, Stock Market, Nifty, Share Market Live News Updates
